findings.description: `formatFileName` property name is missing from s3 hints. This property appears in all three XML configuration examples (basic setup, table name change, and custom flag definition) and is the key property of `StandardFwHeaderDefinition`.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML examples each show: `<property name="formatFileName" value="${headerFileName}" />`

findings.description: Default table name `SENT_MESSAGE` is missing from hints. This is the concrete default table name referenced in the SQL schema example and is the value users would search for when debugging or setting up the sent message table.
findings.source_evidence: Source SQL: `CREATE TABLE SENT_MESSAGE (MESSAGE_ID VARCHAR(64), REQUEST_ID VARCHAR(64), ...)`
